text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
choice_data_list: Placing is plenty impressive, you know.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What are you talking about?! This isn't good enough at all!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You heard the crowd back there, right? They
were cheering for someone else!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Those are supposed to be my cheers!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...No, this can't be right. I can do better.
choice_data_list:
Try to hold onto that frustration. It's part of
your talent.
Then let's make sure we get first next time!
Then let's make sure we get first next time!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...No, this can't be right. I can do better.
choice_data_list:
Try to hold onto that frustration. It's part of
your talent.
Then let's make sure we get first next time!
Then let's make sure we get first next time!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I don't need that kind of talent. I don't want to
feel like this anymore!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: The only talent I need is being the best!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Just watch, Trainer. I'm gonna train even harder,
and next race, I'll obliterate the competition!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna win next time, for sure! Those cheers
will be mine!
